messages.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
Name the 34th vice president of the united states

The 34th Vice President of the United States was Al Gore. He served as Vice President from 1993 to 2001, during the administration of President Bill Clinton. Prior to his time as Vice President, Gore represented Tennessee in the United States Senate from 1985 to 1993, and he was the Democratic Party's nominee for President in the 2000 election.
